name: Soft Lemonade Cookies
recipeIngredient: 6 ounces frozen lemonade concentrate, thawed and divided
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. In a mixing bowl, cream butter and sugar; add eggs. Combine flour and baking soda; add to the creamed mixture alternately with 1/3 cup of lemonade concentrate. Mix well. Drop by rounded teaspoonfuls onto ungreased baking sheets.
3. Bake for 8 minutes. Remove to wire racks. Brush with remaining lemonade concentrate; sprinkle with additional sugar. Cool.
Yield: Approximately 6 dozen.
